product: KS21i (IP55 weather-resistant variant of the KS21 21-inch high-power subwoofer)

electroacoustic.frequency_range_note: Low frequency limit (-10 dB) of 29 Hz with [KS21_60] preset and 31 Hz with [KS21_100]; upper limit set by preset to 60 Hz or 100 Hz
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 138 dB peak at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 4 ([KS21_100]) per amplified controller with LA2Xi bridge mode / LA4X / LA7.16i / LA12X; 131 dB with LA2Xi in standard (non-bridge) mode
electroacoustic.directivity: Omnidirectional in standard configuration; cardioid configuration available (4-box block with one element reversed) for rear SPL rejection
electroacoustic.components: 1 x 21-inch high-excursion neodymium direct-radiating cone driver; bass-reflex acoustical load with L-Vents to reduce port turbulence/noise

amplification.preset_note: Non-C presets are standard config (upper limit 60/100 Hz); _C and _Cx presets are cardioid. LA2Xi reaches full SPL only in bridge (BTL) mode.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point terminal block with push-in connection; each set of (+/-) terminals is interchangeable as IN or LINK
connection.sealing: Connector sealing plate with cable gland for IP55 weatherproofing
connection.cables: 2x 2.5 mm2 speaker cable with bare-wire endings, or custom 2-point speakON-to-bare-wire cable (custom made)

physical.dimensions_mm: 569 W x 629 H x 752 D (front 569 x 629; depth 752)
physical.dimensions_note: Front face 569 mm W x 629 mm H; depth 752 mm; figures from datasheet (752 / 602 / 569 / 629 mm callouts)
physical.cabinet: Premium grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; coated steel grill with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; high-grade steel rigging components with anti-corrosion coating
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

modes: Flown/stacked in combination with A15i or A10i as a full-range line source
Wall- or ceiling-mounted (M8 inserts with bracket)
deployment.inserts: 18 inserts per side: 12 M6 for flown configs with rigging frame, 2 M8 for wall/ceiling mounting, 4 M6 for screen attachment; 1 DIN580-compatible M8 threaded insert for secondary safety
rigging_accessories: A15i-BUMP (flying frame for vertical A15i/KS21i arrays)
KS21i-ULINK II (plates for flying two KS21i with A15KS-Ui)
deployment.safety_note: Flown deployments use 4:1 safety factor (Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC); ground-stacked arrays should be secured with Ai-FIXBRACKET. Use Soundvision to validate any specific array.

usage: Compact 21-inch install subwoofer built to extend the low end of A15i and A10i line source systems down to 29 Hz, with an IP55 rating for weather-exposed permanent installs.

Each enclosure presents an 8-ohm load needing one amplifier channel; pack density runs up to 8 per LA12X or LA7.16i, 4 per LA4X, and on LA2Xi either 4 (single-ended) or 2 when bridged for maximum output.
Drive with [KS21_60] or [KS21_100] presets to set the crossover point (60 or 100 Hz) so the sub blends cleanly with the main system bandwidth.

Deploy in cardioid mode by grouping four boxes with one reversed and loading the _C/_Cx presets to reject low-frequency energy off the back of the array, useful for keeping stages and rear zones clean.
To hit the full 138 dB peak on LA2Xi, the amplifier must run in bridge mode; in standard mode output drops to 131 dB, so plan amp mode around target SPL.
Can be flown (A15i-BUMP) or ground-stacked, including combined arrays with A15i/A10i; secure ground stacks with Ai-FIXBRACKET and verify every array configuration in Soundvision before rigging.
